animation.sf_nba.giraffe.run.anim_time_update: q.anim_time + q.delta_time * 1.2 * v.anim_speed_multiplier * Math.min( 1, q.modified_move_speed / v.anim_speed_movement_max )

animation.sf_nba.giraffe.walk.anim_time_update: q.anim_time + q.delta_time * 2.0 * v.anim_speed_multiplier * Math.min( 1, q.modified_move_speed / v.anim_speed_movement_max )
